ChangeToPrepaid.autoRenew: Whether to auto-renew upon expiration. Values: true: auto-renew, false: no auto-renew. Default: false.
ChangeToPrepaid.autoRenewPeriod: Duration of each auto-renewal (unit: months). Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24, 36. Default: 1. Only valid when autoRenew is true.
ChangeToPrepaid.relationCds: Data disks associated with the change. Deprecated. Associated pay-as-you-go CDS must be converted to prepaid together with BCC.
